hero.headline: 22 Years of Pools Done Right on Time
hero.subheadline: Sarasota's most trusted pool care team handles everything so you never worry about your pool again. Over 1,100 families already enjoy worry-free, crystal-clear water every single week.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> the Team You Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, On-Time Pool Service keeps your pool sparkling so you can spend your time swimming, not scrubbing.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Water chemistry analysis, equipment inspection, debris removal, tile cleaning, and algae prevention. Same dedicated service manager every visit with a detailed condition report.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Variable-speed pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation. Fast diagnosis, expert repair, and professional installation by licensed technicians.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp green? We bring it back to crystal-clear, balanced perfection. Most green pools restored in 48-72 hours.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Control your pumps, heaters, lights, and more from your smartphone. Smart systems that save energy and put convenience at your fingertips.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Resurfacing, custom tile, new pavers, coping, and energy-efficient upgrades. Transform your aging pool into the backyard centerpiece it deserves to be.

cards.title: Salt System Conversions
cards.description: Switch to a saltwater chlorination system for softer water, lower chemical costs, and gentler swimming. Full installation and ongoing maintenance included.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll visit your pool, assess its condition, and give you an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Assign Your Dedicated Tech
steps.description: You get the same licensed service manager every single week. They learn your pool inside and out, and you get a personalized visit report after every service.

steps.title: Enjoy Worry-Free Pool Life
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year long. If anything ever falls short, we come back and make it right at no charge.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts Us
about.headline: 22 Years of Showing Up On Time, Every Time
about.description: Founded in 2004, On-Time Pool Service has grown from a one-man operation to a team of over 25 professionals serving more than 1,100 families across Sarasota and Lakewood Ranch. We are built on five core values: Respect, Integrity, Communication, Quality, and Adaptability. As a Florida state-licensed certified pool contractor and FSPA Service Professional of the Year, we do not just service pools -- we build lasting relationships with the families who own them.
about.badge: FSPA Service Pro of the Year

features.title: Same Tech Every Week
features.description: Your dedicated service manager learns your pool's unique needs. No revolving door of strangers -- the same trusted face every single visit.

features.title: Personalized Visit Reports
features.description: After every service, you receive a detailed report on what was done, water chemistry readings, and any recommendations. Full transparency, always.

features.title: Award-Winning Excellence
features.description: Top 50 Pool Service Company in America, Herald Tribune Readers' Choice 3 years running, and 4th nationally in customer service. Our awards speak to our commitment.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool and budget. Every plan includes your dedicated service manager and visit reports.

guarantee.headline: Our "Always On Time" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at absolutely no cost. We have maintained a 4.9-star rating across 532+ reviews because we stand behind every visit. Your satisfaction is not negotiable -- it is our standard.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. We'll start with a thorough pool inspection, then your dedicated service manager begins regular weekly visits right away.

faqs.question: Will I get the same person every week?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We assign the same dedicated service manager to your pool every single week. They get to know your pool's unique needs and can spot issues before they become problems.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are a Florida state-licensed certified pool contractor (CPC #1459543) with full liability insurance. Every team member is trained, background-checked, and held to our five core values.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, Palmer Ranch, Nokomis, University Park, Bradenton, Lido Key, Longboat Key, Venice, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool renovations too?
faqs.answer: Yes! As a licensed certified pool contractor, we handle everything from resurfacing and tile work to complete pool renovations including pavers, coping, lighting, and energy-efficient equipment upgrades.

testimonials.name: Cheryl S.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool is just what it says -- always on time. And excellent work. Our pool has never looked better, and we have total peace of mind knowing the same person shows up every week.

testimonials.name: John L.
testimonials.text: Justin did an outstanding job replacing a shaft seal. Very friendly and informative. He explained everything clearly and the repair was done fast. This company truly lives up to its name.

testimonials.name: Peter & Gary R.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool Service has been excellent -- reliable and efficient. We have used them for years and they consistently deliver top-quality care. Highly recommend to anyone in Sarasota.
